description: A set of straps and a soft pad, intended to hold a placard or a panel in order to form a chest rig.  This one is in the X pattern: shoulder straps cross each other at the back.

variants.description: A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:multicam>
A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:black>

A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:grey>

A pair of cross-pattern shoulder straps, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  This one features a custom paint job, turning the harness into a representation of all things American: the flag, a bald eagle, fireworks, and loose rounds of .50 BMG.

description: A set of straps and a soft pad, intended to hold a placard or a panel in order to form a chest rig.  This one is in the H pattern: shoulder straps are connected by a textile bridge at the back.  An embedded set of retainers allow holding a gun sling, or a gun attached to one.

variants.description: A pair of shoulder straps connected by a textile bridge, a waist belt, and a spacer pad tangled together.  Can be combined with a panel or a placard into a wearable chest rig.  <variant:multicam>
